Quality Education.reason: Focus on developing skills and lifelong learning aligns with Target 4.4 ('relevant skills for employment').
evidence: 養成自主與終身學習的態度與策略
具備團隊合作與專題製作能力

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: Course emphasizes strategic analysis applicable to economic growth, linking to Target 8.3 ('decent job creation').
evidence: 應用賽局的概念分析實際個案
分析生活及未來工作中所會面臨的各種情境

Quality Education.reason: The course itself is a form of quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) that develops analytical skills for future employment (Target 4.4).
evidence: analyze various situations they will face in life and future work

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course teaches game theory, a core tool for analyzing firm strategy and innovation, which are fundamental to economic productivity and growth (Target 8.2).
evidence: 賽局理論用於商業情境的經典之一

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: As 'Strategic Economics,' the course provides analytical tools for industrial competition and innovation strategy, directly linking to Target 9.2 and 9.5.
evidence: 賽局理論用於商業情境的經典之一
Game-Changer: Game Theory and the Art of Transforming Strategic Situations

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The reading list includes 'Who Gets What-and Why,' which covers market design, a tool for creating fairer allocation mechanisms relevant to reducing inequalities (Target 10.3).
evidence: Roth, A. E. (2015): Who Gets What-and Why: The New Economics of Matchmaking and Market Design

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Game theory is a foundational tool for analyzing political interactions and designing effective institutions (Target 16.6), a potential application of the course content.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course analyzes strategic cooperation, with 'Co-opetition' on the reading list, providing a direct framework for designing effective partnerships (Target 17.17).
evidence: Brandenburger, A. M. and Nalebuff, B. J. (1996): Co-opetition, Crown Business
